chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنْ تَزْوِيجِ النِّسَاءِ عِنْدَ بُلُوغِهِنَّ وَ تَحْصِينِهِنَّ بِالْأَزْوَاجِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 19 – What is reckoned from the marriages of the women during their puberty, and fortifying them with the marriage

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/30)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/30)
text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ خَلَقَ آدَمَ ( عليه السلام ) مِنَ الْمَاءِ وَ الطِّينِ فَهِمَّةُ ابْنِ آدَمَ فِي الْمَاءِ وَ الطِّينِ وَ خَلَقَ حَوَّاءَ مِنْ آدَمَ فَهِمَّةُ النِّسَاءِ فِي الرِّجَالِ فَحَصِّنُوهُنَّ فِي الْبُيُوتِ .

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Created Adam<sup>as</sup> from the water and the clay, so the keenness of the son of Adam<sup>as</sup> is in the water and the clay; and Created Hawwa<sup>as</sup> for Adam<sup>as</sup>, so the keenness of the women is in the men, therefore fortify them in the houses’.
en.sarwar: 4. Aban has narrated from al-Wasitiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Allah created Adam from water and clay so the ambition of the sons of Adam is in water and clay. He created Eve from Adam so the ambition of women is for men and their fortress is in the houses.’”
